Notice Of Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Mar-01-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:00:06 a.m. and concluding at 11:07:42 a.m.

Plaintiff LVNV Funding LLC represented by William Bellor-Yeh, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Bertram Fairries not appearing.

Plaintiff has no witnesses.
Counsel for Plaintiff presents summary of case and an offer of proof.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. A - Bill of Sale
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. B - Personal Loan Account Information - 10/17/2018
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. C - Personal Loan Account Information - 02/28/2019
Plaintiff's Exhibit No. D - Account Summary Report

Court examines counsel for Plaintiff and Plaintiff's witness.
Plaintiff's witness attests that statements by counsel are true and correct.

The matter is submitted.
Based on the summary of the case, comments made by Plaintiff's Counsel, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has proven each essential element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff LVNV Funding LLC, and against Defendant Bertram Fairries, as follows:

1. Damages: $40,324.27
2. Costs: $523.50

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $40,847.77

Proposed judgment to be submitted.
